title: AI Celebrity Red Carpet
description: Uses the default AI provider to stage a photo as a glamorous red carpet appearance.
positive_prompt: Transform the input photo into a glamorous celebrity red carpet appearance at a luxury movie premiere. Preserve the number of people, recognizable identity, facial features, expression, pose, camera angle, and main framing. Upgrade clothing into elegant formalwear while keeping color cues from the original outfit where possible. Add paparazzi flashes, velvet-rope event atmosphere, photographers and crowd softly blurred in the background, cinematic lighting, shallow depth of field, realistic skin detail, and premium editorial polish.
negative_prompt: cartoon, anime, low quality, blurry, amateur photography, changed identity, distorted face, extra limbs, extra fingers, duplicate person, bad anatomy, watermark, logo, readable text, casual clothes, empty background, poor lighting, overexposed, underexposed, pixelated, CGI, unrealistic skin, horror elements, cropped body, motion blur
